requirement_topic.en: INMETRO Mandatory Product Certification — Heat Pumps and Air Conditioners
requirement_topic.zh: INMETRO强制产品认证——热泵和空调
requirement_topic.zht: INMETRO強制產品認證——熱泵和空調

summary.en: Brazil market access for heat pumps and air-source heat pump air conditioners normally requires INMETRO conformity assessment before sale. The importer or local responsible party must work through the applicable Brazilian certification route, use accredited testing and certification where required, prepare Portuguese-language technical documentation and labels, and register or maintain evidence according to the current INMETRO ordinance for the product category. China CCC certification is not recognized as a substitute for INMETRO approval.
summary.zh: 热泵和空气源热泵空调进入巴西市场通常须在销售前完成INMETRO符合性评定。进口商或本地责任方须按适用的巴西认证路径办理，按要求使用认可测试和认证，准备葡萄牙语技术文件和标签，并按现行INMETRO品类法规注册或保存证据。中国CCC认证不被视为INMETRO批准的替代。
summary.zht: 熱泵和空氣源熱泵空調進入巴西市場通常須在銷售前完成INMETRO符合性評定。進口商或本地責任方須按適用的巴西認證路徑辦理，按要求使用認可測試和認證，準備葡萄牙語技術文件和標籤，並按現行INMETRO品類法規註冊或保存證據。中國CCC認證不被視為INMETRO批准的替代。

standards_or_laws: INMETRO mandatory conformity assessment for air conditioners and heat-pump products
Brazilian product certification ordinances applicable to air-conditioning equipment
Portuguese-language labelling and local responsible-party documentation

summary.en: China domestic-market heat pumps commonly use CCC for heat pumps within the mandatory scope, GB 25454 and GB/T 7725 for efficiency and performance declarations, and GB 9237 as a refrigerant safety baseline. These Chinese approvals and reports help build the technical file but do not create Brazil market authorization.
summary.zh: 中国内销热泵通常使用强制范围内热泵的CCC、GB 25454和GB/T 7725能效及性能声明，以及GB 9237制冷剂安全基线。这些中国批准和报告可用于建立技术文件，但不会形成巴西市场授权。
summary.zht: 中國內銷熱泵通常使用強制範圍內熱泵的CCC、GB 25454和GB/T 7725能效及性能聲明，以及GB 9237制冷劑安全基線。這些中國批准和報告可用於建立技術文件，但不會形成巴西市場授權。

standards_or_laws: CCC mandatory for heat pumps at or below 40 kW where in scope

gap.en: The main gap is approval jurisdiction and local execution. Brazil needs the INMETRO route, Portuguese documents, local importer responsibility, Brazil-specific nameplate data, and local conformity marks. Chinese CCC and GB reports must be converted into an INMETRO-ready technical file and may need retesting or document normalization.
gap.zh: 主要差距在批准管辖和本地执行。巴西需要INMETRO路径、葡萄牙语文件、本地进口商责任、巴西特定铭牌数据和本地符合性标识。中国CCC和GB报告须转换为适用于INMETRO的技术文件，并可能需要重新测试或文件规范化。
gap.zht: 主要差距在批准管轄和本地執行。巴西需要INMETRO路徑、葡萄牙語文件、本地進口商責任、巴西特定銘牌資料和本地符合性標識。中國CCC和GB報告須轉換為適用於INMETRO的技術文件，並可能需要重新測試或文件規範化。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory before sale for in-scope heat pumps and air-conditioning equipment under INMETRO conformity assessment
mandatory_status.cn: CCC mandatory for in-scope China-market heat pumps at or below 40 kW; not recognized as Brazil INMETRO certification

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — INMETRO certification and Brazil local responsible-party evidence are mandatory before sale; China CCC and GB documentation are not Brazil approvals.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——销售前须完成INMETRO认证并建立巴西本地责任方证据；中国CCC和GB文件不是巴西批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——銷售前須完成INMETRO認證並建立巴西本地責任方證據；中國CCC和GB文件不是巴西批准。
